experiments.name: Finite algebra exhaustion
experiments.falsifies: finite local algebra claim if nonzero

experiments.name: Branch tree construction test
experiments.input: small initial universes and declared branch rule
experiments.metric: leaf count, admissibility rate, terminal count
experiments.falsifies: branch ontology if impossible to construct

experiments.name: Branch measure normalization test
experiments.pass_condition: below declared tolerance or exact symbolic proof

experiments.name: Decoherence/separation simulation
experiments.metric: decoherence functional or branch inner product
experiments.pass_condition: macroscopic leaves approach declared noninterference threshold
experiments.falsifies: world-like branch interpretation if no separation mechanism

experiments.name: Observer memory consistency
experiments.input: committed histories sampled from branch tree
experiments.pass_condition: every committed record lies on a valid branch
experiments.falsifies: commitment model if orphan records exist

experiments.name: Branch entropy growth study
experiments.metric: S_branch(t), monotonicity, saturation, relation to defects
experiments.pass_condition: matches declared theorem or falsifies it explicitly

experiments.name: Bridge map stability
experiments.input: large ASH branch ensembles under scaling
experiments.metric: dimension, metric consistency, curvature proxies, fluctuation decay

experiments.name: Matched branch controls
experiments.input: ASH branch rule versus randomized/matched branch processes
experiments.metric: effect size of proposed ASH signature
experiments.falsifies: ASH-specific attribution if controls reproduce it

experiments.name: Synthetic universe recovery
experiments.input: universes generated from fixed ASH model
experiments.falsifies: empirical readiness if ASH cannot recover itself

experiments.name: Prospective prediction test
experiments.input: frozen ASH prediction and future/holdout dataset
experiments.metric: prediction interval hit/miss, Bayes factor/log predictive density
